description: Notification settings UI allows users to configure notification categories, actions, and sounds. Settings stored in database and synced with HA server.

flow_steps.details: User configures notification category with actions (foreground, background, authentication-required).
Updated notification categories/actions pushed to HA server via registration update endpoint.

data_type: Push Notification Content (Message text, titles, metadata)
description: Notification history records incoming push notifications content (title, body, userInfo) to local database for review.

flow_steps.code: override func didReceive(_ request:, withContentHandler:) { Current.notificationHistoryStore.record(NotificationHistoryEntry(content: request.content, kind: .remote)) }
flow_steps.details: Notification service extension records notification content (title, body, userInfo) to local database before delivery.
User can view history of received push notifications with content details.

description: Custom notification sounds imported and managed for push notification categories.

flow_steps.details: User manages custom notification sounds for categories.

description: Notification rate limit monitoring displays current rate limit status and resets.

flow_steps.details: Fetches push notification rate limit data from HA server.

description: Notification actions can trigger shortcuts via callback URL scheme.

flow_steps.code: fileprivate func handleShortcutNotification(_ shortcutName:, _ shortcutDict:) { var inputParams: CallbackURLKit.Parameters = shortcutDict }
flow_steps.details: Notification action triggers CallbackURLKit shortcut with parameters from push payload.
